mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.file_url, p.user_id, p.ethnic_group, p.region, p.visibility, p.comments, p.collects, p.like_count, p.top, p.create_time, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar, tag_agg.tagNames FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pt.post_id, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name) as tagNames FROM post_tag pt LEFT JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id GROUP BY pt.post_id ) tag_agg ON p.id = tag_agg.post_id
AND p.user_id = #{targetUserId}
AND p.visibility = 1
AND (p.visibility = 1 OR (p.visibility = 2 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow f WHERE f.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND f.friend_id = #{targetUserId} )))
AND p.visibility = 1
ORDER BY p.top DESC, p.create_time DESC
ORDER BY p.top DESC, p.like_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
ORDER BY p.top DESC, p.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.file_url, p.user_id, p.ethnic_group, p.region, p.visibility, p.comments, p.collects, p.like_count, p.top, p.create_time, u.username as authorUsername, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name) as tagNames FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post_tag pt ON p.id = pt.post_id LEFT JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE p.id = #{postId} GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.content, p.file_url, p.user_id, p.ethnic_group, p.region, p.visibility, p.comments, p.collects, p.like_count, p.top, p.create_time, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar
